title: Anathallis miguelii
taxonomy: Anathallis miguelii is classified within the family Orchidaceae, which includes the majority of orchid species. The genus Anathallis is a part of the subtribe Pleurothallidinae. This subtribe is further divided into several genera, each containing unique orchid species. The classification of Anathallis miguelii is based on its morphological characteristics, such as its flower and leaf structure. Its classification helps in understanding the relationships between different orchid species and their evolutionary history.
